channel.title: Zohocorp — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Zohocorp (zohocorp).

item.title: CVE-2026-8174 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Cross-site Request Forgery
item.description: Zohocorp Zoho Mail wordpress plugin is vulnerable to Cross-Site request forgery (CSRF). This issue affects Zoho Mail wordpress plugin versions before 1.6.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-2740 · 8.4 HIGH — Remote Code Execution
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus version before 6525, DataSecurity Plus before 6264 and RecoveryManager Plus before 6313 are vulnerable to Authenticated Remote code execution in the agent machines due to the bug in the 3rd party dependency.

item.title: CVE-2026-3324 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Authentication Bypass
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Log360 versions 13000 through 13013 are vulnerable to authentication bypass on certain actions due to improper filter configuration.

item.title: CVE-2026-5785 · 8.1 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine PAM360 versions before 8531 and ManageEngine Password Manager Pro versions from 8600 to 13230 are vulnerable to Authenticated SQL injection in the query report module.

item.title: CVE-2026-27655 · 7.3 HIGH — Stored XSS Vulnerability
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions before 5802 are vulnerable to Stored XSS in Permissions Based on Mailboxes report.

item.title: CVE-2026-4108 · 7.3 HIGH — Stored XSS Vulnerability
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions before 5802 are vulnerable to Stored XSS in Non-Owner Mailbox Permission report.

item.title: CVE-2026-4107 · 7.3 HIGH — Stored XSS Vulnerability
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions before 5802 are vulnerable to Stored XSS in Folder Message Count and Size report.

item.title: CVE-2026-3880 · 7.3 HIGH — Stored XSS Vulnerability
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions before 5802 are vulnerable to Stored XSS in Public Folder Client Permissions report.

item.title: CVE-2026-3879 · 7.3 HIGH — Stored XSS Vulnerability
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions before 5802 are vulnerable to Stored XSS in Equipment Mailbox Details report.

item.title: CVE-2026-28703 · 7.3 HIGH — Stored XSS Vulnerability
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions before 5802 are vulnerable to Stored XSS in Mails Exchanged Between Users report.

item.title: CVE-2026-28756 · 7.3 HIGH — Stored XSS Vulnerability
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions before 5802 are vulnerable to Stored XSS in Permissions based on Distribution Groups report.

item.title: CVE-2026-28754 · 7.3 HIGH — Stored XSS Vulnerability
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions before 5802 are vulnerable to Stored XSS in Distribution Lists report.

item.title: CVE-2026-1367 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus versions 6522 and below are vulnerable to authenticated SQL Injection in the search report option.

item.title: CVE-2025-9226 · 4.6 MEDIUM — Stored XSS
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine OpManager, NetFlow Analyzer, and OpUtils versions prior to 128582 are affected by a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Subnet Details.

item.title: CVE-2025-11669 · 8.1 HIGH — Broken Access Control
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine PAM360 versions before 8202; Password Manager Pro versions before 13221; Access Manager Plus versions prior to 4401 are vulnerable to an authorization issue in the initiate remote session functionality.

item.title: CVE-2025-11250 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Authentication Bypass
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus versions before 6519 are vulnerable to Authentication Bypass due to improper filter configurations.

item.title: CVE-2025-9435 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Path Traversal
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADManager Plus versions below 7230 are vulnerable to Path Traversal in the User Management module

item.title: CVE-2025-9787 · 6.1 MEDIUM — Stored XSS
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Applications Manager versions 177400 and below are vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability in the NOC view.

item.title: CVE-2025-11670 · 6.4 MEDIUM — NTLM Hash Exposure Vulnerability
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADManager Plus versions before 8025 are vulnerable to NTLM Hash Exposure. This vulnerability is exploitable only by technicians who have the “Impersonate as Admin” option enabled.

item.title: CVE-2025-9227 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Stored XSS
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine OpManager versions 128609 and below are vulnerable to Stored XSS Vulnerability in the SNMP trap processor.

item.title: CVE-2025-9223 · 8.8 HIGH — Command Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Applications Manager versions 178100 and below are vulnerable to authenticated command injection vulnerability due to the improper configuration in the execute program action feature.

item.title: CVE-2025-8324 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Analytics Plus versions 6170 and below are vulnerable to Unauthenticated SQL Injection due to the improper filter configuration.

item.title: CVE-2025-7633 · 7.3 HIGH — Stored XSS
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions 5723 and below are vulnerable to the Stored XSS Vulnerability in the Custom report.

item.title: CVE-2025-7632 · 7.3 HIGH — Stored XSS
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions 5723 and below are vulnerable to the Stored XSS Vulnerability in the Public Folders report.

item.title: CVE-2025-7430 · 7.3 HIGH — Stored XSS
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions 5723 and below are vulnerable to the Stored XSS Vulnerability in the Folder Message Count and Size report.

item.title: CVE-2025-7429 · 7.3 HIGH — Stored XSS
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions 5723 and below are vulnerable to the Stored XSS Vulnerability in the Mails Deleted or Moved report.

item.title: CVE-2025-5347 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Stored XSS
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions before 5723 are vulnerable to Stored Cross Site Scripting in the reports module.

item.title: CVE-2025-5343 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Stored XSS
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions through 5721 are vulnerable to Stored Cross Site Scripting in the Instant Search option.

item.title: CVE-2025-5342 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Denial of Service (DoS)
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus through 5721 are vulnerable to ReDOS vulnerability in the search module.

item.title: CVE-2025-11248 · 3.2 LOW — Sensitive Information Logged
item.description: ZohoCorp ManageEngine Endpoint Central versions prior to 11.4.2528.05 are vulnerable to a sensitive information logging issue. An authenticated user with access to the logs could potentially obtain the sensitive agent token.

item.title: CVE-2025-6239 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Information disclosure
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Applications Manager versions 176800 and below are vulnerable to information disclosure in File/Directory monitor.

item.title: CVE-2025-10020 · 8.5 HIGH — Command Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADManager Plus version before 8024 are vulnerable to authenticated command injection vulnerability in the Custom Script component.

item.title: CVE-2025-9428 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Analytics Plus versions 6171 and prior are vulnerable to authenticated SQL Injection via the key update api.

item.title: CVE-2025-7473 · 5.2 MEDIUM — XML Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine EndPoint Central versions 11.4.2516.1 and prior are vulnerable to XML Injection.

item.title: CVE-2025-5496 · 3.3 LOW — Arbitrary File Deletion
item.description: ZohoCorp ManageEngine Endpoint Central versions earlier than 11.4.2508.14, 11.4.2516.06, and 11.4.2518.01 are affected by an arbitrary file deletion vulnerability in the agent setup component.

item.title: CVE-2025-5494 · 3.9 LOW — Privilege Escalation
item.description: ZohoCorp ManageEngine Endpoint Central was impacted by an improper privilege management issue in the agent setup. This issue affects Endpoint Central: through 11.4.2500.25, through 11.4.2508.13.

item.title: CVE-2025-8309 · 8.1 HIGH — User privilege escalation vulnerability
item.description: There is an improper privilege management vulnerability identified in ManageEngine's Asset Explorer, ServiceDesk Plus, ServiceDesk Plus MSP, and SupportCenter Plus products by Zohocorp. This vulnerability impacts Asset Explorer versions before 7710,…

item.title: CVE-2025-27930 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Stored XSS
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Applications Manager versions 176600 and prior are vulnerable to stored cross-site scripting in the File/Directory monitor.

item.title: CVE-2025-5966 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Stored XSS
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange reporter Plus version 5722 and below are vulnerable to Stored XSS in the Attachments by filename keyword report.

item.title: CVE-2025-5366 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Stored XSS
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange reporter Plus version 5722 and below are vulnerable to Stored XSS in the Folder-wise read mails with subject report.

item.title: CVE-2025-41444 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions 8510 and prior are vulnerable to authenticated SQL injection in the alerts module.

item.title: CVE-2025-36528 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions 8510 and prior are vulnerable to authenticated SQL injection in Service Account Auditing reports.

item.title: CVE-2025-27709 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions 8510 and prior are vulnerable to authenticated SQL injection in the Service Account Auditing reports.

item.title: CVE-2025-41437 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected XSS
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine OpManager, NetFlow Analyzer, Network Configuration Manager, Firewall Analyzer and OpUtils versions 128565 and below are vulnerable to Reflected XSS on the login page.

item.title: CVE-2025-3835 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Remote Code Execution
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions 5721 and prior are vulnerable to Remote code execution in the Content Search module.

item.title: CVE-2025-41407 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8511 are vulnerable to SQL injection in the OU History report.

item.title: CVE-2025-36527 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8511 are vulnerable to SQL injection while exporting reports.

item.title: CVE-2025-41403 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions 8510 and prior are vulnerable to authenticated SQL injection while fetching service account audit data.

item.title: CVE-2025-3836 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions 8510 and prior are vulnerable to authenticated SQL injection in the logon events aggregate report.

item.title: CVE-2025-3444 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Local File Inclusion
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus MSP and SupportCenter Plus versions below 14920 are vulnerable to authenticated Local File Inclusion (LFI) in the Admin module, where help card content is loaded.
